title: Shadow Image (u_lowsrc)
text: Shadow Image (u_lowsrc) Widget property that defines the path and file name of a low-resolution image to display in the server page while the main image is loading. It sets the lowsrc attribute of the tag in the HTML layout. Description It is useful for users with slow network connections, because a shadow image introduces them to the content of the main image without having to wait for the main image to load fully. Applies to Image (USP) Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
